name: Butter Crunch Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the soft butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the egg and vanilla.
3. Gradually mix in the oatmeal, flaked coconut, and cornflakes.
4. Drop rounded tablespoon-sized balls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
6. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
Yield: Approximately 3 dozen cookies.
